title: Cyient is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Cyient is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Cyient, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cyient:
Cyient is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient!
